Inflation_Dd_Core
Core Inflation — Individual Measures
%
Source: Bank of Canada; Statistics Canada. CPI-trim and CPI-median: BoC staff measures, monthly. CPI-common uses common-component extraction; tends to lag turning points.
Inflation_Dd_Contrib
CPI Component Contributions
%
[Coming soon] Source: Statistics Canada. 60-component CPI decomposition with per-component contributions, monthly.
CPI Components
%
Source: Statistics Canada. Canada CPI by major category, monthly.
CPI Breadth
pp
Source: Statistics Canada. Deviation from 1996–2019 average. Weighted share of 60 basket components with Y/Y change above 3% or below 1%, monthly.
Consumer Inflation Expectations
%
Source: Bank of Canada CSCE. Mean expected CPI inflation 1 year and 5 years ahead, quarterly.
Business Inflation Expectations
%
Source: Bank of Canada BOS. Share of firms expecting CPI inflation in each band over the next two years, quarterly. Buckets sum to ~100%.
About this dashboard — Built by jayzhaomurray using public data from Statistics Canada, the Bank of Canada Valet API, the Federal Reserve (FRED), and the Alberta Economic Dashboard. Raw data available as CSV in the GitHub repository. Section blurbs are AI-generated from public data using a fixed analytical framework verified against primary sources. Not investment advice.
